w:r.w:t: To develop myself as a better professional by continuous learning and thus, to utilize the knowledge & experience gained, towards the achievement of
Seeking a career involving challenging software development & engineering problem.
Proficient in all aspect of software development and system
ethics and the ability to work well in a team or individual environment.
Good experience in analyzing the requirement gathered and developing it module wise.
possess a flexible & result oriented attitude
Hands on experience in working on complete range of project activities, starting from conceptualization, coding and maintenance of the project
Adaptive to any type of work environment and technology.
can update his/her daily activity like log in and logout and can
And there was functionality where user has to fill weekly activity what he/she did on particular
It was SOS app where user can ask help from other person
if he feels he is in danger user can add his/her family contact number and when he feels danger user will press notification so the notification will
to nearby user as well as those contact member who’s number added in contact list when other user will accept notification video call will be started
SDK I used for Video call.
and the user destination path will be display on the user screen I used google map for this
It was transport app actually there was a QR code stick on the vehicle where user can scan the
code and user will get the
It was a Ecommerce app in this I implemented major things Ex: Firebase
It was a Salon app where user can book an appointment to get hair cut or other stuff too once user will book appointment then user will ask to make a payment user will have to option

and full payment once user will book appointment user will get the appointment details over the email and in app “ booking details tab ”there was two roles Vendor and User .if you are signing up as a Vendor user has to verify his/her identity by
card or any national ID and we used DIGIO library to verify user identity.
I hereby declare that all the
information given by me is true
to the best of my knowledge.
